parameters.query:
SELECT
  ip.id AS investor_profile_id,
  ip.contact_id,
  ip.max_budget,
  ip.min_budget,
  ip.preferred_zones,
  ip.preferred_types,
  ip.min_yield,
  ip.investment_horizon,
  ip.risk_profile,
  c.full_name,
  c.email,
  c.phone,
  c.language_detected,
  c.lead_score
FROM investor_profiles ip
JOIN contacts c ON c.id = ip.contact_id
WHERE ip.is_active = true
  AND c.status = 'active'
ORDER BY c.lead_score DESC

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.email_subject }}
parameters.html:
=

Alerta de Investimento

Agency Group | AMI 22506 | Confidencial

{{ $json.email_intro }}

Detalhe da Oportunidade

Preço: €{{ ($json.property_price).toLocaleString('pt-PT') }}

Zona: {{ $json.property_zone }} | Tipo: {{ $json.property_type }}

Yield potencial: {{ $json.property_yield }}% | Área: {{ $json.property_area }}m²

Match Score: {{ $json.match_score }}/100

Razões do match: {{ Array.isArray($json.match_reasons) ? $json.match_reasons.join(' · ') : $json.match_reasons }}

Quero Saber Mais

Agency Group | AMI 22506 | Lisboa, Portugal
Alerta exclusivo enviado com base no seu perfil de investimento registado.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO notifications (contact_id, type, title, body, metadata, sent_at, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.contact_id }}',
  'investor_alert',
  'Nova oportunidade de investimento: {{ $json.property_title }}',
  '{{ $json.whatsapp_alert }}',
  '{"property_id": "{{ $json.property_id }}", "match_score": {{ $json.match_score }}, "channels": ["whatsapp", "email"]}',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
INSERT INTO investment_alerts (investor_profile_id, property_id, match_score, match_reasons, alerted_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.investor_profile_id }}',
  '{{ $json.property_id }}',
  {{ $json.match_score }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.match_reasons) }}',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (investor_profile_id, property_id) DO NOTHING;

parameters.values: ={{ $json.contact_id }},investor_alert,Alerta de propriedade enviado via Workflow D,={{ JSON.stringify({property_id: $json.property_id, property_title: $json.property_title, match_score: $json.match_score, channels: ['whatsapp','email']}) }},={{ new Date().toISOString() }}
